examples: And then behind it, boy, there's a whole lot of unmined data.
Until 30 years ago, it had lain undiscovered, unmined and uninhabited.
At the same time, this article has provided basis and experience for other isolated unmined are...
Both sisters had a prim, close-lipped smile, genuine but guarded, as if a full-on grin risked conveying complexities best left unmined.
